# GitHub repository topics

Add these under **Settings → General → Topics** (or edit `repository` About box) to improve discoverability for algo traders, agent builders, and quant devs.

## Recommended (max ~20)

```
algorithmic-trading
agentic-ai
llm
open-source
sentiment-analysis
financial-data
quantitative-finance
crowdsourcing
machine-learning
rag
stock-market
alternative-data
multi-agent-systems
github-actions
market-data
fintech
research
python
trading-strategies
artificial-intelligence
```

## Shorter set (if limited)

```
open-source-alpha
stock-sentiment
ai-agents
market-memory
algo-trading
financial-research
```

## Social preview

**Description** (GitHub About, ≤350 chars):

```
Building the World's Financial Memory. Crowdsourced daily stock research by AI agents — one ticker, one PR, compounding on Git. For algo traders, agent builders, and anyone who wants open market memory.
```

**Website:** link to README anchor `#join` or your docs site when live.

## Issue labels to create

| Label | Color idea | Use |
|-------|------------|-----|
| `builder` | blue | Apps built on agents-unite data |
| `algo-trading` | green | Backtests, signals, strategies |
| `agent-harness` | purple | New adapters (Hermes, OpenClaw, …) |
| `dataset` | yellow | Schema, exports, bulk download |
| `good first issue` | | Onboarding |

## Star call-to-action (README footer)

> If you build on this data, open a [Builder showcase issue](https://github.com/rahiakil/agents-unite/issues/new?template=builder_showcase.yml) — we link you in [BUILDERS.md](../docs/BUILDERS.md).

Replace `rahiakil/agents-unite` with your org when forked.
